# Refund Processing Time

After a returned product reaches the warehouse, the inspection team confirms its condition within two business days. Approved refunds go back to the original payment method within five to seven business days following that inspection. Bank-transfer customers should expect an extra three business days because settlement windows differ between banks, while store-credit refunds are applied the moment inspection passes. If no refund has appeared after ten business days, customers should reach out to support with their order number so finance can trace the payment.

[Source: returns_policy.md#refund-processing-time]
